basics.name: Jay S
basics.headline: Product & Technology Leader | Technical Product Manager | Product Manager
basics.summary: Strategic Principal Product Manager with over five years of experience leading end-to-end technology products and zero-to-one launches. Expert in driving product vision and roadmaps with an AI-first mindset, leveraging GenAI and predictive analytics to optimize customer experiences. A data-driven leader skilled at stakeholder alignment and rapid experimentation to accelerate validation cycles in complex ecosystems.

work.name: Covai Labs
work.summary: Spearheaded the technical strategy, product execution, and modernization for a telecom AI suite, revitalizing a legacy portfolio. Client: Skyvera.
highlights: Legacy System Lifecycle Management:Formulated and executed a version deprecation strategy for an SMS center product suite, seamlessly migrating clients to a single, supported latest version while operating within existing SLAs and contract constraints, significantly reducing engineering load.

AI Feature Ideation & Strategy:Ideated and defined requirements for AI-focused capabilities. ConceptualizedKandy Notetaker(UCaaS integration for call transcription, diarization, and AI-driven insights/summaries) andLithium Defender(LLM-based phishing detection layer for the SMS center).

AI-Native Product Launch:Architected and launchedAI-native products(includingKandy Notetakerfor meeting intelligence &Lithium Defenderfor spam detection), extending the lifecycle of legacy UCaaS systems and opening new revenue streams (securing ARR from legacy bases).
Platform Strategy:Defined unified product vision to consolidate 11 fragmented software versions, reducing technical debt by85%and enabling faster feature iteration.

Technical Roadmap Ownership:Championed infrastructure modernization initiative from Oracle to PostgreSQL, eliminating$2M+ annual licensing coststo reinvest in customer-facing innovation while maintaining 99.9% uptime.
Product Discovery:Accelerated time-to-market by60%by prototyping LLM concepts (Claude Code, Cursor) to validate user value before engineering commitment.
Customer Experience:Designed and launched self-service portals with embedded RAG AI agents, which automated release note distribution and deflected support tickets.

Cross-Functional Leadership:Operated as the central technical liaison coordinating between engineering, DevOps, commercial, and customer support teams, authoring detailed technical specifications that prioritized API scalability.
Moved product versioning from YY.MM to SemVer (Major.Minor.Patch) to better reflect maturity and release cadence.
Championed productivity tooling for internal teams — introduced Markdown, LaTeX, Marp; built custom RAG tools to streamline workflows.
Set up a self-hosted RAG (Cinnamon/kotaemon) for sales, PS, and support to query internal docs. Later retired it and migrated content to ephor.ai and NotebookLM when those matured.
MVP Delivery (Independent Contract):Managed the end-to-end development lifecycle for two MVP products: aLive Shoppingapplication and aGarage Management Portal.
Technical Definition (Independent Contract):Defined technical architecture (React.js, Node.js, MongoDB) and translated business requirements into precise API specifications for rapid market entry.
Requirement Gathering (Independent Contract):Translated stakeholder needs into user stories and technical requirements, ensuring the final delivery met business goals.

work.name: Taxilla IT Solutions
work.summary: Owned the product lifecycle for a Fintech/RegTech SaaS platform, driving international expansion and compliance.
highlights: RegTech Strategy & Global Expansion:Led the product roadmap for entering stringent international markets (KSA, UAE), ensuring the platform met complex data sovereignty and cryptographic signing requirements.

Platform Scalability:Collaborated with architects to redesign a core high-throughput transaction engine for reconciliation acrossBanking, Insurance, and E-commerce, supporting a350% increasein volume.

Customer Success & MVP:Built MVP solutions for each industry use-case, personally conducting capability demos for prospective leads and onboarding key accounts for initialUser Acceptance Testing (UAT).
User Adoption & Growth:Achieved an80% increase in platform adoptionand a350% increase in web trafficby conducting user research to identify friction points and redesigning the onboarding flow.
Cross-Functional Enablement:Reduced internal team ramp-up time by50%by establishing a structured knowledge framework that aligned Inside Sales, Support, Development, and QA teams.
GTM & Sales Enablement:Spearheaded marketing initiatives, lead generation, and conducted technical sales presentations and POC demos, accelerating the enterprise sales cycle.

work.name: ValueLabs
highlights: New Product Development:Led a zero-to-one digital transformation initiative, validating the concept through pilots and securing3 enterprise contractsbefore General Availability (GA).
Cloud Solution Design:Collaborated with technical architects to define cloud-based solutions (AWS) that addressed complex business challenges, ensuring technical feasibility matched business goals.
Conversion Optimization:Partnered with design and engineering to implement ML-driven user flows, resulting in a10% increase in conversion ratesfor client platforms.
Presales & Marketing:Led marketing efforts and cross-functional presales activities, delivering tailored sales presentations and technical product demos to secure enterprise contracts.

work.name: CIBI (Startup Incubator)
work.summary: MBA Internship. CIBI is a pre-incubation program supporting early-stage startup teams.
highlights: Startup Enablement: Advised and supported a cohort of 15 startup teams in the pre-incubation phase on market analysis, product development, and business strategy. Conducted comprehensive startup assessments, provided sector insights, and developed pitch materials.
Workshops & Training: Initiated and conducted educational sessions equipping incubatees with strategic frameworks and methodologies for successful business development.

work.name: IBM
highlights: Process Automation:Developed and deployed Python/Bash automation scripts that reduced service desk ticket resolution time by30%, directly improving SLA adherence.
Day-to-day: handling tickets, triaging issues, troubleshooting, and routing to appropriate teams.
Knowledge Management:Architected a centralized knowledge repository for the team, streamlining daily operations, standardizing edge-case handling, and reducing onboarding time by40%.

work.name: LightMass
highlights: Open Source Infrastructure Initiative:Initiated and executed a company-wide migration from unlicensed Windows environments toCentOS Linux,LibreOffice, and other OSS. This eliminated legal compliance risk, saved$50k+ in licensing fees, and reduced malware incidents to zero.
Performance Leadership:Managed a team of 18 agents, improving Service Level Agreement (SLA) delivery by35%through rigorous data-driven performance metrics.

work.name: Sutherland
highlights: Security Specialization:Diagnosed and removed complex rootkits and ransomware from compromised Windows endpoints, gathering critical threat signature data to refine McAfee's detection algorithms.
Performance Excellence:Exceeded performance targets by120%for a major U.S. credit bureau client, maintaining high customer retention rates.
Also handled knowledge base updates and on-the-job training for new joiners.

skills.name: Product Roadmap Strategy
skills.proofPoint: Successfully defined and executed roadmap strategies for zero-to-one technology products, ensuring cross-functional alignment and timely delivery.

skills.name: AI-first Mindset
skills.proofPoint: Built and deployed AI-powered solutions using RAG and LangGraph to drive predictive intelligence and automate complex customer interaction workflows.

skills.name: Customer Experience (CX) Optimization
skills.proofPoint: Optimized customer satisfaction and conversion by identifying behavioral defects and implementing data-driven feature improvements in social applications.

skills.name: End-to-End Product Delivery
skills.proofPoint: Managed the complete product lifecycle from initial concept and PRD authoring to launch and post-release optimization for complex tech products.

skills.name: Data-Driven Decision Making
skills.proofPoint: Leveraged OKRs and performance metrics to size opportunities and accelerate validation cycles for technology-driven business strategies.

projects.name: Safe LGBT Dating
projects.description: Led the end-to-end product delivery of a secure dating platform, integrating Aadhar-based identity verification as a strategic enabler to mitigate safety defects and optimize the customer experience journey.

projects.name: AI Powered Relationship counselor
projects.description: Developed an AI-first predictive tool utilizing LLMs and RAG to automate hypothesis validation for user engagement, accelerating the feedback cycle for customer sentiment analysis.
